---
pagetitle: "Projects — Yash Tiwari"
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     NAVBAR — identical across all pages.
     EDIT NAV LINKS HERE if you rename pages.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="navbar">
  <a href="index.html" class="nav-logo">YT.</a>

  <nav class="nav-links">
    <a href="index.html"    class="nav-link">Home</a>
    <a href="projects.html" class="nav-link">Projects</a>
    <a href="resume.html"   class="nav-link">Resume</a>
    <a href="about.html"    class="nav-link">About</a>
  </nav>

  <div class="nav-right">
    <a href="https://github.com/rsm-ytiwari" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="GitHub">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M9 19c-5 1.5-5-2.5-7-3m14 6v-3.87a3.37 3.37 0 0 0-.94-2.61c3.14-.35 6.44-1.54 6.44-7A5.44 5.44 0 0 0 20 4.77 5.07 5.07 0 0 0 19.91 1S18.73.65 16 2.48a13.38 13.38 0 0 0-7 0C6.27.65 5.09 1 5.09 1A5.07 5.07 0 0 0 5 4.77a5.44 5.44 0 0 0-1.5 3.78c0 5.42 3.3 6.61 6.44 7A3.37 3.37 0 0 0 9 18.13V22"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/yash-tiwari-here/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="nav-icon" aria-label="LinkedIn">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-2-2 2 2 0 0 0-2 2v7h-4v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6z"/>
        <rect x="2" y="9" width="4" height="12"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/>
      </svg>
    </a>
    <button class="nav-icon" aria-label="Search">
      <svg width="17" height="17" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
        <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/>
      </svg>
    </button>
    <button class="theme-pill" id="theme-toggle" aria-label="Toggle theme">
      <span id="theme-icon">
        <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <path d="M21 12.79A9 9 0 1 1 11.21 3 7 7 0 0 0 21 12.79z"/>
        </svg>
      </span>
      <span id="theme-label">Dark</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</header>


<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FEATURED BANNER
     EDIT BANNER HERE — change the title and subtitle freely.
     The label ("Work") is a small uppercase tag above the title.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="page-banner">
  <!-- EDIT LABEL -->
  <div class="banner-label">Work</div>

  <!-- EDIT TITLE -->
  <h1 class="banner-title">All Projects</h1>

  <!-- EDIT SUBTITLE -->
  <p class="banner-sub">
    ML pipelines, product analytics, and agentic systems — built
    to drive measurable business outcomes, not just to demo well.
  </p>
</div>
<!-- ── END BANNER ── -->


<!--
TO ADD A NEW PROJECT:
1. Add an entry to projects.json (set featured: false
   unless you want it on the homepage too)
2. Create projects/your-project.qmd (copy traway.qmd)
3. Run: quarto render
That's it. No HTML to touch.
-->

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     FULL PROJECTS GRID — rendered from projects.json
     EDIT projects.json to add, remove, or update projects.
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="projects-section">

  <!-- Stats bar: project count + discipline tags -->
  <div class="projects-stats">
    <span id="project-count">—</span> Projects
    &nbsp;·&nbsp; ML · Analytics · Agentic AI
  </div>

  <!-- Filter bar: "All" is hardcoded; category buttons injected by JS -->
  <div class="filter-bar" id="filter-bar">
    <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>
  </div>

  <!-- Empty state: shown when active filter has no matches -->
  <p id="empty-state"
     style="display:none; color:var(--text-muted); font-size:14px; padding:40px 0;">
    No projects in this category yet.
  </p>

  <div id="projects-grid" class="cards-grid"></div>

</div>
<!-- ── END PROJECTS GRID ── -->

<script>
/* EDIT projects.json to add/remove projects */
(function () {
  // Detect the repo base path from window.location
  const path = window.location.pathname;
  const base = path.includes('/portfolio_website/')
    ? '/portfolio_website/'
    : './';

  function cardHTML(item) {
    const preview = item.image
      ? `<img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.title}" class="p-preview-img">`
      : `<div class="p-preview"><span>Project Preview</span></div>`;

    const tags = item.tags.slice(0, 4)
      .map(function (t) { return `<span class="p-tag">${t}</span>`; })
      .join('');

    const link = item.href || '#';

    const catAttr = Array.isArray(item.category)
      ? item.category.join(',')
      : (item.category || '');

    return `
      <div class="p-card" data-category="${catAttr}">
        ${preview}
        <div class="p-body">
          <div class="p-meta">
            <span class="p-num">${item.number}</span>
            <span class="p-year">${item.year}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="p-title">${item.title}</div>
          <div class="p-desc">${item.summary}</div>
          <div class="p-tags">${tags}</div>
          <a href="${link}" class="p-more">Read more →</a>
        </div>
      </div>`;
  }

  function updateEmptyState() {
    const visible = Array.from(
      document.querySelectorAll('#projects-grid .p-card')
    ).filter(function (c) { return c.style.display !== 'none'; });
    const emptyEl = document.getElementById('empty-state');
    if (emptyEl) emptyEl.style.display = visible.length === 0 ? 'block' : 'none';
  }

  fetch(base + 'projects.json')
    .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
    .then(function (projects) {

      /* ── Stats bar ── */
      document.getElementById('project-count').textContent = projects.length;

      /* ── Category filter buttons ── */
      const cats = Array.from(new Set(
        projects.reduce(function (acc, p) {
          return acc.concat(
            Array.isArray(p.category) ? p.category : [p.category || 'Other']
          );
        }, [])
      )).sort();

      const bar = document.getElementById('filter-bar');
      cats.forEach(function (cat) {
        const btn = document.createElement('button');
        btn.className = 'filter-btn';
        btn.dataset.filter = cat;
        btn.textContent = cat;
        bar.appendChild(btn);
      });

      /* ── Render cards ── */
      document.getElementById('projects-grid').innerHTML =
        projects.map(cardHTML).join('');

      /* ── Click-to-navigate ── */
      document.querySelectorAll('#projects-grid .p-card').forEach(function (card) {
        card.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
          if (e.target.closest('a')) return;
          var link = this.querySelector('.p-more');
          if (link && link.getAttribute('href') !== '#') {
            this.blur();
            window.location.href = link.href;
          }
        });
      });

      /* ── Filter bar click handler ── */
      bar.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        const btn = e.target.closest('.filter-btn');
        if (!btn) return;

        document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn')
          .forEach(function (b) { b.classList.remove('active'); });
        btn.classList.add('active');

        const filter = btn.dataset.filter;
        document.querySelectorAll('#projects-grid .p-card').forEach(function (card) {
          const cardCats = card.dataset.category
            ? card.dataset.category.split(',')
            : [];
          const show = filter === 'all' || cardCats.includes(filter);
          card.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
        });

        updateEmptyState();
      });

    })
    .catch(function (err) {
      console.error('Could not load projects.json:', err);
    });
})();
</script>


<!-- Toast (shared element for clipboard feedback) -->
<div class="toast" id="toast">✓ Copied to clipboard</div>
```
